items.title: Formatter and linter: correct the failure model

options.text: Use formatting for consistent presentation and linting for bounded static checks, review automatic changes, and retain tests and human reasoning for behavior.
Formatter and linter are synonyms, and code that passes both cannot contain bugs or security flaws.
